creator: cmt@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 199829
update liferea to 1.12.6

Liferea 1.12.6 is out.

https://github.com/lwindolf/liferea/releases/tag/v1.12.6

Attached patch does the trivial update and removes the USE_GITHUB parts - we get a proper tarball this time again (even with all the autoconf bits done).
